\begin{tablenotes}\small
\item Notes: $d$ is the fractional differencing parameter estimated from squared returns (volatility proxy). GPH is the Geweke-Porter-Hudak log-periodogram estimator; Local Whittle is the semiparametric estimator. Bandwidth $m = T^{0.65}$. \% Sig. is the percentage of stocks with $d$ significantly different from zero at 5\%.
\end{tablenotes}
